testcase.name: searchMultipleProducts

testcase.name: closeLoginPopup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.InvalidSelectorException: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression span[@role['button'] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string 'span[@role['button']' is not a valid XPath expression.
